summary: Start M6-BATCH-AUTORUN-BALANCE-DASHBOARD-001 after M6-ACCESSIBILITY-CORE-FLOWS-001 closed on origin/main. The balance_analyst must implement local deterministic Alpha batch auto-run evidence and a read-only balance dashboard without telemetry, accounts, paid services, servers, hidden personal data, production analytics, automatic tuning, or authoritative save/WorldState payload expansion.

tests_run.result: Previous task validated CLOSED after closure merge.
main was clean and synchronized with origin/main before branch creation.

decisions: Start M6-BATCH-AUTORUN-BALANCE-DASHBOARD-001 as the next dependency-ready M6 task after M6-ACCESSIBILITY-CORE-FLOWS-001 closure entered origin/main.
Scope is local Alpha batch balance evidence and read-only dashboard only; no telemetry or live analytics.
Batch outputs must be deterministic, schema-versioned, bounded, reproducible, and non-authoritative.
Balance evidence may identify P0/P1 candidates and tuning risks, but must not automatically change content or simulation rules.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; server/multiplayer/accounts/secrets/paid services/runtime SQL/ORM are excluded.
risks: R3 work crosses sim-runner/sim-ai/sim-core/client/UI/test surfaces; independent qa_reviewer acceptance is required.
Batch artifacts must stay small and local; accidental telemetry, production analytics, or authoritative save/state expansion would be scope drift.
Balance dashboard must be read-only over generated artifacts and must not become a tuning authority.
requested_action: Implement within allowed paths, run required tests, record deterministic batch/dashboard evidence, and emit REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer.
